title: devco-agent-skills Project Profile
description: Auto-detected project metadata written by session-init.sh and setup-kit.sh. Serves as the single source of truth for project context consumed by all downstream hooks and skills.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor validation and autocompletion.

detectedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this profile was last written by session-init.sh.

projectName.description: Basename of the project root directory.

buildTool.description: Detected build tool for this project.

springType.description: Detected Spring framework type. 'WebFlux' for reactive projects, 'MVC' for servlet-based projects, null if not detected.

summer.description: Whether the Summer Framework (io.f8a.summer) is detected in the project's build file.

summerVersion.description: Detected Summer Framework version (e.g. '1.2.3'). Null if Summer is not used or version cannot be detected.

javaVersion.description: OS-level Java runtime version string as reported by 'java -version' (e.g. '17.0.9'). Null if Java is not found.

javaProjectVersion.description: Java version configured in the project's build file (e.g. sourceCompatibility, toolchain languageVersion). Null if not configured explicitly.

branch.description: Current git branch name at the time of detection. 'detached' if in detached HEAD state. Empty string if not a git repo.

dependencies.description: Boolean flags for detected infrastructure dependencies, scanned from the project's build file.

postgresql.description: True if postgresql or r2dbc-postgresql dependency detected.

mysql.description: True if mysql or r2dbc-mysql dependency detected.

redis.description: True if redis or lettuce dependency detected.

rabbitmq.description: True if rabbitmq or amqp dependency detected.

docker.description: True if testcontainers or docker dependency detected.

stack.description: Additional detected stack information. Keys are technology names, values are version strings or boolean flags. Populated during /dc-setup auto-detection.
